description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 3times, applies [Grievous Wound] 1 stack, and increases Physical DMG taken by [25%->30%] for [10sec->4sec].

For [10sec->5sec], increases all allies’ ATK by 300*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion by [250->150], and grants self [Breath of Death] for [10sec->7sec]. [Breath of Death]: Evades all Physical Attacks..

Moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, then consumes all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target to deal additional Physical DMG per 1 stacks consumed. On Critical Hit, applies Bleed stacks 1 and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter]. [(removed) recovers 2 orbs of Mana]
Every [(added) 10sec], when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals Physical DMG 6 times. Each hit has a [50%->65%] chance to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1.

light.unified: The target is changed to the enemy with the highest ATK.

dark.unified: Increases Attack Speed of all allies by 10% for the duration.

light.unified: The chance for [Rend] to apply [Fatal Wound] stacks is changed to 100%.

description.unified: [Merciless] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critical Hit.
[Curtain of Darkness] increases duration by 3 sec and boosts DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%.
[Hack] increases DMG by [50%->{0}%] and applies 1 Stack of [Bleed] to the target on Crit.

dark.unified: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by [300->24%] and Critical Damage by [60%->48%] for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.

description.unified: When using Normal Attacks or [Rend], has a {0}% chance to apply 1 additional stacks of [Fatal Wound] and deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power per [Fatal Wound] Stack.

Summons the soul of Specter’s Breath, Redeal for 12 sec, increasing own Crit DMG by [80%->70%]. Each time Roi uses [Blade Claw], deals P.DMG to the target. [(removed) inflicts 1 stack of Mortal Wound]

1.from: For the duration of Skill, [Blade Claw] does not remove [Mortal Wound] stacks.
1.to: During the duration, [Blade Claw] does not remove [Mortal Wound].
1.unified: During the duration, [Blade Claw] does not remove [Mortal Wound].

2.from: For the duration of Skill, fixes Cooldown of [Blade Claw] to 0 sec, and additionally recovers 1 orb of Mana upon use.
2.to: During the duration, [Blade Claw] increases P.DMG taken by 50% for 7sec.
2.unified: During the duration, [Blade Claw] increases P.DMG taken by 50% for 7sec. [(removed) fixes Cooldown to 0 sec and recovers 1 orb of Mana]
